changes.exact_quote: Vendor will provide internal onboarding materials to personnel assigned to the service.
changes.proposed_redline: Vendor will ensure those personnel are bound by confidentiality obligations and receive privacy and security training before receiving production access and at least once per calendar year.

changes.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Vendor may study service records, build trend reports, tune automated systems, create commercial benchmarks, and enhance offerings for accounts other than Customer.
changes.proposed_redline: Vendor will process Personal Data only as necessary to provide the services to Customer, secure and support those services, or comply with applicable law. Vendor will not use Personal Data for Vendor's own analytics, benchmarking, product development, model training, advertising, or other independent business purposes.

changes.exact_quote: Vendor need not notify Customer of a personal-data breach until ten business days after Vendor completes its internal investigation.
changes.proposed_redline: Vendor will notify Customer without undue delay and in any event within 48 hours after discovering a personal-data breach.

changes.exact_quote: Vendor will not assist with data-subject requests or regulator inquiries, although it may reference privacy assessments and available information.
changes.proposed_redline: Vendor will reasonably assist Customer with data subject requests, regulator inquiries, and privacy assessments relating to the services, taking into account the nature of processing and information available to Vendor.

summary: All eight T2-N response children reviewed against the v4 answer key.
